flowSection.body: Modern tools, used in a personal practice. The system works quietly in the background so your visit can be about your health — not paperwork.

stages.label: Before
stages.body: Complete paperwork, history, and insurance on your own device before you arrive. Copays handled up front so check-in is quick.

stages.label: In the room
stages.body: Your doctor walks in already familiar with your story. The visit is about you — not catching up on forms.

stages.label: After
stages.body: A short text-message survey gives you a moment to tell us if anything could have gone better — usually within minutes of leaving.

stages.label: Between visits
stages.body: Refills, forms, quick questions, care coordination — handled by secure text with our staff. Or call and reach a familiar voice. Our call tree even gives you the option to text instead.

flowSection.footer: Quiet efficiency. More comfort. More time with your doctor.

priviaSection.body: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is locally owned and physician-led — one of the independent practices that together make up Privia Medical Group, a physician-led ACO and national collective of member practices. We share a simple commitment: raise the standard of primary care, and stay accountable to the patients and communities we serve.
priviaSection.attribution: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is a proud member of Privia Medical Group. The best doctors in our community have joined together to form Privia Medical Group (PMG), a multi-specialty, high-performance medical group that puts patients first. Our physicians are united by the mission of providing better, more coordinated care for their patients.
priviaSection.footer: Proud to be part of Privia Medical Group.

reviewsSection.body: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is new — but the team behind it isn't. These are real Google reviews for our sister practice, Vero Beach Pediatrics, run by the same family.
reviewsSection.emptyBody: Be the first to share your experience with Vero Beach Adult Medicine.

videosSection.body: Short videos covering what to expect, who we are, and how we work.

socialSection.body: Updates, patient education, and behind-the-scenes from Instagram and Facebook.

vbpSection.body: Vero Beach Pediatrics opened in 2022 with deep local roots, started because Vero families wanted an alternative — a practice they'd recognize, with staff who know them by name. Built and maintained by the community it serves, VBP has stood for that kind of care from day one. Vero Beach Adult Medicine carries the same conviction forward for adults in 2026.

servicesSection.subhead: Primary care that pays attention to the whole of your health — not just the reason you came in today.

facebookUpdates.heading: Closures and quick updates,
facebookUpdates.body: Holiday hours, weather closures, and short notes from the practice — posted to our Facebook page and shown here as they happen. Clear this URL in the CMS to hide the section.

ctaStrip.proof: ★★★★★  Rated 5.0 across 364 Google reviews at our sister practice, Vero Beach Pediatrics.
ctaStrip.subhead: Our inaugural panel is intentionally limited. Register online in minutes, or call to reserve your place. Most insurance accepted.

principles.body: A practice that knows your name — from the front desk to your physician. You see your doctor for your wellness visits and ongoing care, and your story follows you across the team between visits, because continuity is how good medicine works.
Annual well visits, screenings, and lab reviews are how we practice — every patient, every year. We catch problems before they become serious.
Same-day sick visits when we can, virtual care when we can't, and a front desk that knows your name and your story. The kind of care families have come to expect.

positioning.body1: Vero Beach Adult Medicine was built by the same team behind Vero Beach Pediatrics — a practice with deep local roots, started because Vero Beach families wanted an alternative to how medicine has been delivered here. Not a call center on the other end of the phone. Not a different face at every visit. A practice deliberately kept small, where you know who answers, who works the front desk, and who your doctor is.
positioning.pullQuote: One physician. One panel. Your whole story.
positioning.body2: We practice medicine the way it was meant to work — a limited panel, so your physician has the time continuity requires. The staff knows your name, your doctor knows you, and your story follows you between visits — not just when something goes wrong.

hero.tagline: Your own physician. Sunrise to shoreline.
hero.lede: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is a relationship-based primary care practice built on a deliberately limited panel — so the doctor who knows your name has the time your care deserves. You see the same physician for the full picture: annual well visits, preventive screenings, chronic disease management, and acute care. Register online in minutes and reach our staff by secure text between visits. Founding patients welcome now; most insurance accepted.

trustBar: One physician who knows your name
Register online · Secure text with your care team
Sibling of Vero Beach Pediatrics · 5.0★ Google

homeServices.title: Annual Physicals & Wellness
homeServices.body: Your annual exam includes bloodwork, preventive screenings, immunization review, mental health, and a real conversation about where your health is headed.

homeServices.title: Chronic Condition Management
homeServices.body: Hypertension, diabetes, thyroid, high cholesterol — actively managed by a physician who tracks your trends and adjusts your plan as your health changes.

homeServices.title: Same-Day Sick Visits
homeServices.body: When you're sick, we make every effort to fit you in same-day. When our schedule is full, virtual care gives you a prompt option.

homeServices.title: Women's & Men's Health
homeServices.body: Annual exams, hormone health, perimenopause care, and men's wellness — addressed with the same clinical attention we bring to every visit.

homeServices.title: Preventive Screenings & Labs
homeServices.body: Bloodwork ordered for you and evidence-based screening protocols. We choose what's appropriate for your age and risk profile — and go over results with you directly.

homeServices.title: Lifestyle & Wellness Guidance
homeServices.body: Practical, everyday guidance on weight, nutrition, sleep, and stress — plus routine vaccinations — woven into your regular care.
